title: Login Failure
description: Users are unable to login and receiving 403 forbidden error.

title: Authentication Issue
description: Login page shows access denied error when submitting credentials.

title: Payment Failure
description: Transaction is failing during checkout with payment gateway error.

title: Checkout Error
description: Users cannot complete purchase due to payment processing failure.

title: UI Bug in Signup
description: Signup button is not clickable and form is stuck.

title: Registration Issue
description: Users are unable to register because submit button is disabled.

title: Database Timeout
description: System is slow and checkout page is timing out due to DB connection issues.
